title: John Maxwell
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2019 08 12 keep things simple.

Leadership author / speaker referenced as a source of an aphorism: "You've got to have people in your corner." Yahir noted this in 2019 alongside questions about disruption, legacy, and pitching.

related.label: 'Life is meaningless without a pursuit' — Oct 2019 success-is-rented thesis
